channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Bastl Kalimba is a wild synth that thinks it’s a thumb piano
item.description: Make no mistake, the Bastl Kalimba is a synthesizer, you just play it like a kalimba. Its tines don't really make much sound. There is an internal mic that you can blend in for a little acoustic spice, but it's mostly driven by the synth engine that combines physical modeling and FM. The tines are […]

item.title: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
item.description: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.

item.title: Tiny company steals AMD's thunder and challenges Nvidia with old-tech PCIe AI accelerator that runs 700B LLMs locally, sipping just 240W thanks to decade-old DDR4 and 28nm chips
item.description: Skymizer introduced a low power PCIe AI accelerator using older chips and LPDDR memory for massive language model inference.

item.title: GM agrees to pay $12.75 million to settle California lawsuit over misuse of customers' driving data
item.description: General Motors collected driving data through OnStar and sold it to data brokers.

item.title: Samsung has a massive TV sale ahead of Memorial Day — up to $1,500 off top-rated 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs
item.description: Samsung is clearing out its TVs ahead of Memorial Day with a massive sale and record-low prices on top-rated 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: Dua Lipa is suing Samsung for $15 million
item.description: The singer accused the tech giant of illegally using her likeness to sell TVs.

item.title: I’ve been testing controllers for half a decade, and not a single budget option has impressed me like the 8BitDo Pro 3
item.description: The 8BitDo Pro 3 took one look at the Switch 2 Pro Controller and said ‘hold my beer’.

item.title: These 18 clever outdoor kitchen solutions from IKEA will let you create a stunning summer cooking space on a budget
item.description: Impress your friends and family this summer with a stylish outdoor kitchen that looks far more expensive than it was.
